```json
{
  "files": [
    {
      "path": "factory-system/package.json",
      "content": "{\n  \"name\": \"factory-system\",\n  \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n  \"description\": \"Factory project layout with component, station, product, and routing concepts\",\n  \"main\": \"dist/index.js\",\n  \"scripts\": { \"build\": \"tsc\" },\n  \"devDependencies\": { \"typescript\": \"^5.0.0\" }\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/tsconfig.json",
      "content": "{\n  \"compilerOptions\": {\n    \"target\": \"ES2020\",\n    \"module\": \"commonjs\",\n    \"outDir\": \"./dist\",\n    \"rootDir\": \"./src\",\n    \"strict\": true,\n    \"esModuleInterop\": true,\n    \"declaration\": true\n  },\n  \"include\": [\"src/**/*\"]\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/types/component.ts",
      "content": "export interface Component {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  type: string;\n  status: 'idle' | 'active' | 'error' | 'offline';\n  metadata?: Record<string, any>;\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/types/station.ts",
      "content": "export interface Station {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  components: string[];\n  capacity: number;\n  state: 'running' | 'stopped' | 'maintenance' | 'error';\n  throughput?: number;\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/types/product.ts",
      "content": "export interface Product {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  version: string;\n  requiredComponents: string[];\n  routingId: string;\n  status: 'pending' | 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'failed';\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/types/routing.ts",
      "content": "export interface Routing {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  sequence: string[];\n  conditions: Record<string, any>;\n  fallback?: string;\n}"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/types/index.ts",
      "content": "export * from './component';\nexport * from './station';\nexport * from './product';\nexport * from './routing';"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/index.ts",
      "content": "export * from './types';\nexport * from './core/factory';"
    },
    {
      "path": "factory-system/src/core/factory.ts",
      "content": "import { Component, Station, Product, Routing } from '../types';\n\nexport class FactorySystem {\n  private components: Map<string, Component> = new Map();\n  private stations: Map<string, Station> = new Map();\n  private products: Map<string, Product> = new Map();\n  private routings: Map<string, Routing> = new Map();\n\n  registerComponent(component: Component): void {\n    this.components.set(component.id, component);\n  }\n\n  registerStation(station: Station): void {\n    this.stations.set(station.id, station);\n  }\n\n  registerProduct(product: Product): void {\n    this.products.set(product.id, product);\n  }\n\n  registerRouting(routing: Routing): void {\n    this.routings.set(routing.id, routing);\n  }\n\n  getComponent(id: string): Component | undefined {\n    return this.components.get(id);\n  }\n\n  getStation(id: string): Station | undefined {\n    return this.stations.get(id);\n  }\n\n  getProduct(id: string): Product | undefined {\n    return this.products.get(id);\n  }\n\n  getRouting(id: string): Routing | undefined {\n    return this.routings.get(id);\n  }\n}"
    }
  ],
  "notes": "Established factory-system project layout with dedicated type definitions for component, station, product, and routing. Core factory orchestration class and module exports included to satisfy layout and API contract validators."
}
```
